mapper.select: SELECT id, route_id, order_id, stop_sequence, eta, status FROM route_stops WHERE route_id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO routes (id, driver_id, vehicle_id, status, planned_date) VALUES (#{id, jdbcType=OTHER}, #{driverId, jdbcType=OTHER}, #{vehicleId, jdbcType=OTHER}, #{status}, #{plannedDate})
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM routes WHERE id = #{id}
